title: goniopteris penangiana
intro: Goniopteris penangiana, also known as the Penang lady fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Blechnaceae. It is native to Southeast Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Goniopteris penangiana include treating wounds, reducing fever, and alleviating digestive issues, as well as having potential anti-cancer properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be applied topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
